title: Phylactery Unbound
description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]5[/blue]. At the start of your turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]2[/blue].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Starter relic that spawns pets. Summons 5 creatures at the beginning of each combat and 2 creatures at the start of each player turn.
